reasoning: France has surged to clear favoritism after a perfect group stage and a dominant 3-0 win over Sweden, with the Opta supercomputer lifting them to the top spot around 18.7% and bookmakers pricing them shortest at roughly +200. Kylian Mbappe leading the Golden Boot race underlines a deep, in-form squad, and Germany's shock penalty exit to Paraguay actually softened France's likely quarterfinal path. Holders Argentina (perfect 3-0-0, Messi with six goals) and European champions Spain are the main threats, with England lurking despite a demanding route through possible Mexico and Brazil ties. Morocco is the live outsider: level with Brazil in Group C, they held the Netherlands 1-1 and carry genuine deep-run pedigree, though the co-hosts' altitude and travel edge keeps Mexico interesting too.
